No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to poverty eradication or economic resources for the poor.

Quality Education.reason: Both models correctly identified that course objectives align with Target 4.7 by fostering an appreciation for cultural diversity and its contribution to human development.
